# ApplicationType enumeration

The DCR `application_type` (spec §23.4, R-23.4-m – R-23.4-o).

```csharp
public enum ApplicationType
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Native | `0` | Desktop/mobile/CLI/localhost-hosted apps (R-23.4-n). |
| Web | `1` | Remote browser-based apps from a non-local host (R-23.4-o). |
